summary: Claurst is an open-source terminal coding agent built in Rust that serves as a multi-provider TUI pair programmer. It aims to enhance the coding experience by providing features like plugin support, chat forking, and memory consolidation without tracking or telemetry.
use_cases: Collaborating on coding projects with team members via shared chat sessions
Using Claurst as a coding assistant to explain complex codebases
Integrating Claurst into an IDE for enhanced coding productivity
